title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
BTC +3.09% (24h) → $65,837 (two-week high; chip-AI trade recovering)
ETH +4.59% (24h) → $1,933
BTC spot ETFs: 5 straight days of inflows totalling $600M+
FOMC Jul hike odds ~15% (down from ~40% last week); meeting Jul 28-29
Gold near 9-month low at $4,022; DXY flat at 100.73
